description: Example Vault HTTP KV v2 client config for seccomp-privacy-platform
notes: Set base_url to your Vault address (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8200) and either VAULT_TOKEN or AppRole env vars to use live Vault
When base_url is empty or no live Vault credentials are available, the client falls back to mock_file for local dev/CI
mount defaults to 'secret' (Vault KV v2 default mount)
mock_file must point to a vault_kv_backend/v1 JSON file
token_cache_file is optional and stores short-lived AppRole login tokens between calls
